about.title: About Me

summaryParagraphs: Flutter App Developer (Software Engineer L1) with a strong focus on building scalable, performant mobile applications using Dart and Riverpod. Experienced in implementing Clean Architecture to ensure code maintainability and efficiency.

I hold a Bachelor's in Computer Science from BRAC University and am passionate about developing user-centric software. Currently focused on mastering the Flutter ecosystem while contributing to impactful projects at Catch Bangladesh LTD.
